name: usually-is
prompt: Close-up. Older woman with slight acknowledgment in expression — the first hint of warmth, or at least recognition. Silver-streaked hair, sharp features. Cool blue lighting. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: ascendancy-choice
prompt: Medium shot. Older woman explaining with precision and clarity. Precise hand gesture visible. Sovereignty military uniform with Commandant insignia, cool blue-white transport lighting. Expression serious, authoritative, teaching. Silver-streaked dark hair, sharp features. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Reva
dialogue.text: The Ascendancy chose to remember death. To hold mortality as meaning. They believed finitude was what made choices matter.

name: choosing-limitation
prompt: Close-up. Older woman's face, fair assessment visible in expression. Not dismissing the opposition. Silver-streaked dark hair, sharp features. Cool blue light from left. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Reva
dialogue.text: They weren't wrong. They were choosing limitation the way someone chooses a discipline.

name: two-shot-viewport
prompt: Medium wide shot from end of row. Brunette woman (Sera) LEFT against viewport showing convoy, older silver-haired woman (Reva) RIGHT facing her. Both in profile. Convoy visible through glass behind Sera. Cool blue-white lighting throughout. The debate framed. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

name: sovereignty-choice
prompt: Medium shot. Older woman continuing to explain, gesturing slightly. Expression conveying weight of choice. Sovereignty uniform, Commandant insignia. Cool blue-white lighting from above. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Reva
dialogue.text: The Sovereignty chose differently. To forget. To build past the old limits, past the fear that had shaped every human value for a hundred thousand years.
